extension.summary: Automatically track your Kodi watches on PunchPlay.tv
extension.description: Track movies and TV episodes you watch in Kodi, sync progress to PunchPlay.tv, import watched history, and rate titles after watching.
extension.disclaimer: Requires a PunchPlay.tv account and a running PunchPlay API backend.
extension.news: 1.3.0 - Add backend identify fallback, stronger movie/TV/anime parsing, library import preview, rating suppression options, stricter backend URL validation, and broader tests/docs
